title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
